name: Chocolate Chip Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Cream peanut butter, shortening, sugars, egg, and vanilla thoroughly.
3. Stir together flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture; blend well.
5. Fold in chocolate chips.
6. Drop batter 2 inches apart onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or a silicone baking mat.
7. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes, until golden brown.
8. Let stand 2 minutes before removing from the baking sheet.
